mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews ( store_id, user_number, category, review_content, rating ) VALUES ( #{storeId}, #{userNumber}, #{category}, #{reviewContent}, #{rating} )
mapper.select: SELECT reviews.review_id, reviews.store_id, reviews.user_number, reviews.category, reviews.review_content, reviews.rating, reviews.created_date, users.user_name AS nickname, users.profile_image AS profileImage, (SELECT store_name FROM stores WHERE store_id = reviews.store_id) AS storeName, (SELECT IFNULL(AVG(rating), 0) FROM reviews WHERE store_id = #{storeId}) AS averageRating, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Reviews WHERE store_id = #{storeId}) AS reviewCount FROM reviews JOIN users ON reviews.user_number = users.user_number WHERE reviews.store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY reviews.created_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bookmark (user_number, storeId, prefer) VALUES (#{userNumber}, #{storeId}, 1)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM bookmark WHERE user_number = #{userNumber} AND storeId = #{storeId}
mapper.select: SELECT store_id AS storeId, store_name AS storeName, store_address AS storeAddress, store_phone AS storePhone FROM stores WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews ( store_id, user_number, category, review_content, rating, created_date ) VALUES ( #{storeId}, #{userNumber}, #{category}, #{reviewContent}, #{rating}, NOW() )
